title: stelis dupliciformis
intro: Stelis dupliciformis, also known as the duplicate stelis, is a type of orchid species native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stelis dupliciformis include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis dupliciformis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
